items.title: Canada secure last-16 place after dramatic late winner vs South Africa
items.summary: Stephen Eustaquio scored a dramatic stoppage-time winner for co-hosts Canada as they beat South Africa 1-0 to become the first team to book their place in the last 16 of the World Cup.

items.title: 'Best thing for me' - Stokes reveals decisions behind dramatic retirement
items.summary: Ben Stokes insists retiring from international cricket is the “best thing” for him after sensationally confirming mid-match that England’s series decider with New Zealand would be his last.

items.title: Canada into last 16 with late winner against South Africa
items.summary: Stephen Eustaquio scores a dramatic winner in the second minute of injury time as co-hosts Canada beat South Africa to move into the last 16 of the World Cup for the first time.

items.title: South Africa 0 Canada 1: Stunning Eustaquio injury time half-volley sends hosts into last 16 as Alphonso Davies returns
items.summary: We have a new contender for the worst match of the 2026 World Cup. The clash between Canada and South Africa was nothing short of a snoozefest, with the two sides combined for one of the least exciting 90 minutes of football imaginable. But it was Jesse Marsch’s Canadians that would come out on top.
